title: Due To A Mix-up At The Hotel, Two Coworkers End Up Sharing A Room On A Business Trip
overview: Douki-chan tries to take advantage of the mix-up on a business trip to seduce a coworker she likes.

title: My coworker and I were in the elevator together and then we were trapped inside together
overview: Douki-chan and the coworker she likes are trapped in the elevator together. Can she use this opportunity to get closer to him?

title: The Junior Who Gives Chocolate On Valentine's Day At Work
overview: Douki-chan makes chocolates for the coworker she likes, but her Junior steals him away.

title: My Coworker Who Came Back To Pick Up What He Left Behind
overview: Douki-kun comes back to the restaurant and sees that Douki-chan has fallen asleep. He helps her get home, and then...?

title: A Coworker Who Was Looking Forward To A White Day Gift...
overview: March 14th is White Day, when men who received chocolates on Valentine's Day are supposed to give back thank-you gifts. Douki-chan is hopeful that she'll get one from Douki-kun.

title: My Coworker Who Received An Embarrassing Selfie
overview: Douki-chan accidentally sends her cosplay selfie to Douki-kun. Out of embarrassment, she calls in sick. But she gets this weird feeling and decides to go to work.

title: A Coworker Who Goes All-Out With Seductive Lingerie
overview: Douki-chan puts on the best lingerie to tell Douki-kun how she really feels. However, another unexpected rival shows up.

title: They Clash!! The Junior Coworker VS The Business Client Senpai!
overview: Dinner with Douki-kun has now turned into drinking with Douki-chan's rivals. But Douki-kun pulls her aside to be alone with her.

title: A Coworker Who's Obliviously Asleep
overview: After Douki-chan's attempt to tell her feelings to Douki-kun was interrupted, she wakes up next morning naked, and not alone.

title: A Coworker Who's Excited About A Poolside Date
overview: Douki-chan and Douki-kun receive free tickets to the luxurious hotel pool. Douki-chan shows up in a new swimsuit, and waiting for her at the pool are Douki-kun and...?

title: It Finally Bears Fruit!! Good For You, Douki-Chan
overview: Douki-chan and Douki-kun are at a wedding, and some guys hit on Douki-chan.

title: That's What I'm Talking About, Douki-Kun
overview: Douki-kun whisks Douki-chan away from the guys who are hitting on her. Then Douki-chan performs in her maid costume.
